query: Find 10 buildings in Trondheim municipality that intersect quick-clay hazard areas with high risk class and are closest to the municipality centroid, sorted by shortest distance first.

1.description: Get Trondheim municipality number and geometry

2.description: Compute centroid of Trondheim municipality geometry

3.description: Get buildings in Trondheim (by kommunenummer) with geometry

4.description: Get quick‑clay hazard polygons with high risk class

5.description: Select buildings that intersect high‑risk quick‑clay areas

6.description: Compute distance from each intersecting building to the municipality centroid

7.description: Order buildings by shortest distance to centroid
